response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, and some systems programming, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. There is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency (a hard requirement), no Linux kernel investigation or modification experience, and only brief C/C++ exposure (six months at National Instruments) rather than the strong C-for-UNIX proficiency required. Embedded networking security technologies such as MACsec, 802.1X, and switch-chip SDKs are entirely absent from the resume.
strengths: Solid low-level and performance-oriented experience (DLang async I/O, low-latency microservices, C/C++ IDE components)
Long, consistent engineering career with demonstrated ownership across full development lifecycles
Linux, CI/CD, and dev-environment building experience aligns with preferred tooling skills
concerns: No indication of Japanese language ability, which is a mandatory requirement
No Linux kernel, embedded networking, or security-protocol (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP/NETCONF) experience
Career trajectory is web/full-stack focused; C experience is brief and dated

key_factors.factor: General systems and Linux engineering competence
